chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 126 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.04.2024 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-University. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-University has filed a schedule and undertakes that as per schedule all the pensionary benefits would be paid to the petitioner. A copy of the schedule has been supplied to Counsel for the petitioner, who is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. However, default in making payment to the petitioner would expose the violator to the contempt proceedings without any notice. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
